value:
I appreciate you reaching out, but I think there may be some confusion—we're an airline support team, so account recovery for Hotmail or email services isn't something we handle. You'll want to contact Microsoft directly through their account recovery page or support portal, as they're the ones who can help verify your identity and regain access to those accounts.

If you have any questions about flights, bookings, or travel with us, I'm happy to help with those!
